narrative_beat: Figura de manto sai por portal gotico — sala de conselho vazia atras

style_reference.textual_description: dark cinematic chiaroscuro, Caravaggio-inspired, foreground in rich warm tones (crimson, amber, gold) with background in desaturated black-and-white, film grain, candlelight, floating orange embers

subject.primary: a cloaked figure in full silhouette exiting through a Gothic stone archway into blinding golden exterior light
subject.focal_point: the elongated shadow stretching back into the room
subject.secondary: Empty council chairs and fallen parchments on a long table behind the figure. Low-lying smoke on the floor.

environment.location: interior of a Renaissance council hall opening to bright exterior

composition.foreground: silhouetted figure at right third, dark contre-jour
composition.midground: empty table with scattered documents in desaturated tones
composition.background: blinding golden light beam from exterior through the Gothic arch

lighting.key_light: intense golden backlight from exterior creating full silhouette
lighting.rim_light: gold edge light defining cloak contour

style.post_processing: halation, crushed blacks, amber highlights, anamorphic lens flares
style.texture_detail: 35mm film grain, dust particles, floating orange embers

symbolism.primary: departure of old power, the empty throne left behind
symbolism.secondary: light as both escape and judgement

negative_as_positive: clean frame without visible text or watermarks
photorealistic documentary cinematography, not illustrated or cartoon
analog film photography aesthetic, no digital art flatness
muted desaturated background palette, warm saturated foreground only

multimodal_inputs.instruction: Transfer color palette, lighting, grain, atmosphere only. Do not copy composition.
